creator: mr-spott@gmx.de
text:
Thanks. If you let me know where your pain is located, then I might even be able to fix it quickly. The only thing I just noticed is, that Makefile required the adjustment of placing the configuration into:


/usr/local/etc/rsyncd/rsyncd.config.sample

instead of the old setup of placing it under

/usr/local/etc/rsyncd.config.sample


But I didn't really understand your Makefile and I don't just want to mess arround in it.


I purposly removed you mv(8) command, due to the fact of missing something or even worse - overwriting something. I have a good feeling giving affected users a hint in form of a message instead of auto mv.

Best regards
